zh.lifeSummary: Emma de Bulmer是Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth和Emma Fossard的女兒，於1144年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾。她於大約1175年與Geoffrey de Neville在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1208年在英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比享年64歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆布朗加斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Emma de Bulmer是Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth和Emma Fossard的女儿，于1144年出生在英国英格兰越可爾。她于大约1175年与Geoffrey de Neville在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1208年在英国英格兰達勒姆拉比享年64岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆布朗加斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bulmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Durham): habitational name from either of two places called Bulmer, in the North Yorkshire and Essex, or from Boulmer in Northumberland. The Yorkshire place, recorded in Domesday Book as Bolemere, is named in Old English with bula ‘bull’ + mere ‘lake’, as is Boulmer; the Essex placename, found in early records as Bulenemera, is from bulena (genitive plural of bula) + mere ‘lake’.

variants.name: Bolmer
meanings: Dutch: probably from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldemar, composed of the elements bald ‘bold’ + mar ‘famous’.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: Emma de Bulmer was born in 1144, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth and Emma Fossard. She married Geoffrey de Neville about 1175, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1208, in Raby, Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Brancepeth, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Emma de Bulmer est née en 1144, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth et Emma Fossard. Elle a épousé Geoffrey de Neville environ 1175, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1208, à Raby, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Brancepeth, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Emma de Bulmer wurde 1144 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth und Emma Fossard geboren. Sie hat um 1175 in England Geoffrey de Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1208 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Raby, Durham, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Brancepeth, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Emma de Bulmer è nata il nel 1144 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth e Emma Fossard. Lei sposato Geoffrey de Neville circa 1175, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1208, nel Raby, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Brancepeth, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Bulmerは1144年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでBertram de Bulmer Lord of BrancepethとEmma Fossardの娘として生まれた。約1175年にイギリスでGeoffrey de Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1208年にイギリスイギリスダルハムラビーで64歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムブランセペスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Bulmer(은)는 1144년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth(와)과 Emma Fossard의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1175년 영국에서 Geoffrey de Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1208년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 브랜스프스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Emma de Bulmer nasceu em 1144, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth e Emma Fossard. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey de Neville aproximadamente 1175, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1208, em Raby, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Emma de Bulmer родилась в 1144 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth и Emma Fossard. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey de Neville около 1175 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1208 г. в местности раби, дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности брансепет, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Emma de Bulmer nació en 1144, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Bertram de Bulmer Lord of Brancepeth y Emma Fossard. Se casó con Geoffrey de Neville aproximadamente 1175, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1208, en Raby, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra.
